---
title: "Figure 4J_EC Capillary_HeatMap"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)

# Path to integrated Seurat object
lungQuery <- readRDS("path_to_object/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```

```{r}
# Subset EC general capillary cells
ec_cap_obj <- subset(
  lungQuery,
  subset = predicted.ann_finest_level == "EC general capillary"
)

table(ec_cap_obj$predicted.ann_finest_level)

# Define developmental stages
ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom <- NA

ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[ec_cap_obj$Donor %in% c("s062")] <- "Early Saccular"
ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[ec_cap_obj$Donor %in% c("s088", "s229", "s232")] <- "Saccular"
ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[ec_cap_obj$Donor %in% c("threeDayM", "twelveDayF")] <- "Early Alveolar"
ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[ec_cap_obj$Donor %in% c("twoYrOldM", "twoYrOldM2")] <- "Alveolar"
ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[ec_cap_obj$Donor_Group == "PT_BPD"] <- "PT_BPD"

stage_order <- c(
  "Early Saccular",
  "Saccular",
  "Early Alveolar",
  "Alveolar",
  "PT_BPD"
)

# Keep only selected stages
cells_use <- rownames(ec_cap_obj@meta.data)[
  ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom %in% stage_order
]

ec_cap_obj <- subset(ec_cap_obj, cells = cells_use)

ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom <- factor(
  ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom,
  levels = stage_order
)

# Check cell numbers
table(ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom)
table(ec_cap_obj$Donor, ec_cap_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom)

# WNT / growth factor genes
genes_use <- c(
  "WNT10B",
  "CTNNB1",
  "AXIN2",
  "LEF1",
  "BMPR1B",
  "BMPR2",
  "TGFB1",
  "TGFBR1",
  "IGF1R",
  "IGF2",
  "PDGFA",
  "VEGFA",
  "ZEB1",
  "ZEB2"
)

# Get expression matrix
expr_mat <- GetAssayData(
  ec_cap_obj,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data"
)

genes_use <- genes_use[genes_use %in% rownames(expr_mat)]
genes_use

expr_sub <- expr_mat[genes_use, ]

meta <- ec_cap_obj@meta.data
meta <- meta[colnames(expr_sub), ]

# Average expression by stage
avg_exp <- sapply(stage_order, function(stage) {
  cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$Lung_Stage_Custom == stage]
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cells, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_exp <- as.matrix(avg_exp)
colnames(avg_exp) <- stage_order

# Remove genes with no expression / no variation
avg_exp <- avg_exp[rowSums(avg_exp) > 0, ]
avg_exp <- avg_exp[apply(avg_exp, 1, sd) > 0, ]

# Z-score by gene
avg_exp_z <- t(scale(t(avg_exp)))
avg_exp_z <- avg_exp_z[complete.cases(avg_exp_z), ]

# Plot heatmap
pheatmap(
  avg_exp_z,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  border_color = "black",
  fontsize_row = 11,
  fontsize_col = 11,
  cellwidth = 30,
  cellheight = 20,
  angle_col = 45,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
  main = "EC General Capillary WNT-Growth Factor Signaling"
)

# Save heatmap PDF
pdf("EC_General_Capillary_WNT_GrowthFactor_Heatmap.pdf", width = 8, height = 7)

pheatmap(
  avg_exp_z,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  border_color = "black",
  fontsize_row = 11,
  fontsize_col = 11,
  cellwidth = 30,
  cellheight = 20,
  angle_col = 45,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
  main = "EC General Capillary WNT-Growth Factor Signaling"
)

dev.off()

# Export CSV
write.csv(
  data.frame(
    Gene = rownames(avg_exp_z),
    avg_exp_z,
    row.names = NULL
  ),
  "EC_General_Capillary_WNT_GrowthFactor_Heatmap_Zscore.csv",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)
